# Caso: Suma (clásico) | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Clásicos
function Solve([double[]]$arr) { return ($arr | Measure-Object -Sum).Sum }

snippets.D0001:
# Caso: Crear base de datos | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
CREATE DATABASE demo_db;
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0002:
# Caso: Crear tabla | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
USE demo_db;
CREATE TABLE dbo.users (
  id INT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY,
  name NVARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  email NVARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,
  created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT SYSDATETIME()
);
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0003:
# Caso: Insertar registro | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
INSERT INTO dbo.users(name, email) VALUES (N'Ana', N'ana@demo.cl');
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0004:
# Caso: Actualizar registro | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
UPDATE dbo.users SET email = N'ana2@demo.cl' WHERE id = 1;
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0005:
# Caso: Eliminar registro | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
DELETE FROM dbo.users WHERE id = 1;
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0006:
# Caso: Seleccionar con filtro | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
SELECT id, name, email, created_at
FROM dbo.users
WHERE email LIKE N'%@demo.cl'
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0007:
# Caso: Join básico | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id AS order_id, o.total
FROM dbo.users u
JOIN dbo.orders o ON o.user_id = u.id
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0008:
# Caso: Crear índice | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_users_email ON dbo.users(email);
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0009:
# Caso: Transacción | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
BEGIN TRAN;
  UPDATE dbo.users SET email = N'x@demo.cl' WHERE id = 1;
  -- Si algo falla: ROLLBACK TRAN;
COMMIT TRAN;
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0010:
# Caso: Upsert | Nivel: Intermedio | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
MERGE dbo.users AS t
USING (SELECT N'Ana' AS name, N'ana@demo.cl' AS email) AS s
ON t.email = s.email
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.name = s.name
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(name,email) VALUES(s.name,s.email);
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0011:
# Caso: Paginación | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
SELECT id, name, email
FROM dbo.users
ORDER BY id
OFFSET 20 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()
snippets.D0012:
# Caso: Crear vista | Nivel: Básico | Categoría: Base de datos
# PowerShell (SQL Server) - ejemplo con SqlClient.
# Env: SQLSERVER_CONN
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Data
$cn = New-Object System.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection($env:SQLSERVER_CONN)
$cn.Open()
$cmd = $cn.CreateCommand()
$cmd.CommandText = @"
CREATE VIEW dbo.v_users AS
SELECT id, name, email FROM dbo.users;
"@
$cmd.ExecuteNonQuery() | Out-Null
$cn.Close()

snippets.C0652:

# Nota: En PowerShell, lo más práctico es llamar a un validador externo (ajv/jsonschema) o hacerlo en .NET con NJsonSchema.
snippets.C0653:
# C0653 · Hash de contraseña + verificación (Intermedio, Seguridad)
# PowerShell · .NET PasswordHasher (ASP.NET Identity)
Add-Type -AssemblyName Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity
$hasher = New-Object Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.PasswordHasher`1[object]
$hash = $hasher.HashPassword($null, "secret")
$res = $hasher.VerifyHashedPassword($null, $hash, "secret")
$ok = ($res -ne [Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity.PasswordVerificationResult]::Failed)
@{ hash=$hash; ok=$ok }
snippets.C0654:
# C0654 · JWT: crear y validar
# Nota: En PowerShell puedes usar System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt (igual que C#) para crear/validar tokens.
snippets.C0655:
# C0655 · Fecha/hora y zonas (UTC ↔ America/Santiago)
# Nota: Usa librería de timezones del ecosistema (tzdata) o funciones del SO.
snippets.C0657:
# C0657 · ZIP: crear y extraer (Intermedio, Archivos)
# PowerShell · Compress-Archive / Expand-Archive
"hola" | Set-Content a.txt
"mundo" | Set-Content b.txt
Compress-Archive -Path a.txt,b.txt -DestinationPath demo.zip -Force
Expand-Archive -Path demo.zip -DestinationPath out -Force
snippets.C0662:
# C0662 · Excel con formato (Intermedio, Reportes)
# PowerShell · ImportExcel
# Install-Module ImportExcel -Scope CurrentUser
$rows = @(
  [pscustomobject]@{Nombre="Ana"; Email="ana@demo.cl"; Puntos=10},
  [pscustomobject]@{Nombre="Beto"; Email="beto@demo.cl"; Puntos=7},
  [pscustomobject]@{Nombre="Carla"; Email="carla@demo.cl"; Puntos=9}
)
$rows | Export-Excel -Path "reporte_formato.xlsx" -WorksheetName "Reporte" -BoldTopRow -FreezeTopRow -AutoSize
snippets.C0663:
# C0663 · PDF con tabla
# Nota: Genera PDF con tabla usando la librería PDF típica del lenguaje.
snippets.C0664:
# C0664 · Gráfico con 2 series + etiquetas (Intermedio, Reportes)
# PowerShell + Charting (2 series)
Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Windows.Forms.DataVisualization
$chart = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.DataVisualization.Charting.Chart
$chart.Width=600; $chart.Height=400
$area = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.DataVisualization.Charting.ChartArea
$chart.ChartAreas.Add($area) | Out-Null

$s1 = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.DataVisualization.Charting.Series
$s1.Name="Serie 1"; $s1.ChartType="Column"
$s2 = New-Object System.Windows.Forms.DataVisualization.Charting.Series
$s2.Name="Serie 2"; $s2.ChartType="Column"
$chart.Series.Add($s1) | Out-Null
$chart.Series.Add($s2) | Out-Null

$s1.Points.AddXY("A",3) | Out-Null
$s1.Points.AddXY("B",7) | Out-Null
$s1.Points.AddXY("C",5) | Out-Null
$s2.Points.AddXY("A",2) | Out-Null
$s2.Points.AddXY("B",4) | Out-Null
$s2.Points.AddXY("C",6) | Out-Null

$chart.SaveImage("barras_2_series.png","Png")
